zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth D'Encre於1149年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆阿爾伯特時，她的父親Baudouin d'Encre51歲，母親Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis44歲。她和Gautier III De Heilly至少有6個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於大約1200年在法國皮卡迪索姆海利享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth D'Encre于1149年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆阿爾伯特时，她的父亲Baudouin d'Encre51岁，母亲Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis44岁。她和Gautier III De Heilly至少有6个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于大约1200年在法国皮卡迪索姆海利享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: D'Encre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

variants.name: Denmark
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth D'Encre was born in 1149, in Albert, Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Baudouin d'Encre, was 51 and her mother, Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, was 44. She had at least 6 sons and 4 daughters with Gautier III De Heilly. She died about 1200, in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth D'Encre est née en 1149, à Albert, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Baudouin d'Encre, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, avait 44 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles avec Gautier III De Heilly. Elle est décédée environ 1200, à Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth D'Encre 1149 in Albert, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin d'Encre 51 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis 44. Sie hatte mit Gautier III De Heilly mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1200 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth D'Encre è nata il nel 1149 nel Albert, Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin d'Encre, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, aveva 44 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie con Gautier III De Heilly. Morì circa 1200, nel Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth D'Encreが1149年にフランスピカーディソンメアルバートで生まれた時，父Baudouin d'Encreは51歳，母Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisisは44歳であった。彼女はGautier III De Heillyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1200年にフランスピカーディソンメヘイリーで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth D'Encre(이)가 1149년 프랑스 피카디 솜 알버트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin d'Encre(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Gautier III De Heilly(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1200년 프랑스 피카디 솜 헤이리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth D'Encre nasceu em 1149, em Albert, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Baudouin d'Encre, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, tinha 44 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas com Gautier III De Heilly. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1200, em Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth D'Encre родилась в 1149 г. в местности альбирт, сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin d'Encre было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, 44. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери от Gautier III De Heilly. Она умерла около 1200 г. в местности хилли, сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth D'Encre nació en 1149, en Albert, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Baudouin d'Encre, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Clermont en Beauvaisis, tenía 44 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas con Gautier III De Heilly. Murió aproximadamente 1200, en Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
